issue_title: [Bug] clipboard.svg in the sponsorblock popup fails to load and appears to not exist
issue_body_preview:
What should be a clipboard icon is replaced by a default broken image placeholder and right clicking and selecting "Load Image" creates an error in the dev console: `net: :ERR_FAILED`. Screenshots below: 
![sponsorblockclipboarderror](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/10383240/122324501-bda
test_description_zh: 打开 SponsorBlock 浏览器扩展的弹出窗口（popup），观察其中应显示剪贴板图标的位置，检查该图标是否正常加载和显示。
expected_result_zh: 弹出窗口中的剪贴板图标（clipboard.svg）应正常加载并完整显示，不应出现破损图片占位符或加载失败的情况。
